source: A Windshield Wiper appears to have become stuck.
A passenger door has become stuck. Identify and manually operate the door to unstick it.
target: 乘客门卡住了。找到并手动操作该门以使其恢复。

source: AWS has forced a penalty brake, reset AWS and wait until penalty duration times out to begin taking power again.
target: 自动警报系统强制实施惩罚制动，请复位自动警报系统并等待惩罚时间结束，之后即可再次施加动力。

source: Driver Safety Device is in emergency. Bring train to a stop and use vigilance pedal to clear this Emergency Brake
target: 司机失能防护装置处于紧急状态。请停车并使用警惕踏板来解除紧急制动

source: Insert and set the Master Key to ON and set the Reverser away from OFF to activate this cab.
target: 插入主钥匙并设为开启，将方向手柄移出关闭位以激活此司机室。

source: Move Reverser to NEUTRAL before using compressor.
target: 在使用压缩机前将方向手柄移至空档。

source: Move the Throttle to OFF and then set the DRA to OFF to disable the DRA.
target: 将牵引手柄移至关闭位，然后将驱动制动联锁设为关闭位以禁用驱动制动联锁。

source: Set the Reverser away from OFF to activate this cab.
target: 将方向手柄移出关闭位以激活此司机室

source: Set the direction of travel to FORWARD or REVERSE before applying power.
target: 在施加牵引力前将行驶方向设置为前进或后退

source: The engine must first be started to allow power to be applied.
target: 必须先启动发动机才能施加牵引力

source: The passenger Train Lights have turned off.
This passenger door has been unstuck.
target: 这扇乘客门已不再卡住

source: Traction lock will not release while the passenger doors are open or unlocked.
target: 乘客门开启或解锁时牵引锁定不会解除。

source: Denied. Dispatcher is unable to authorize movements.
target: 已拒绝，调度员无法授权此次调动

source: Denied. Move up to the signal and wait.
target: 已拒绝，请前进至信号灯处等待

source: Denied. Service not authorized in signalled area.
target: 已拒绝，信号区域内未授权提供服务
已拒绝，前方区段有列车

source: Denied. Wait for signal to change.
target: 已拒绝，请等待信号改变

source: Denied. Your train appears to be off path.
target: 已拒绝，您的列车似乎偏离了预定轨道
